emails.subject: Performance Reviews
emails.body: Performance Reviews Here is my draft written review. Take a look at it and we'll sit down when you have a chance. Keep up the great work. I know things have been really stressful for you lately. It was terrific to have you to rely on when I was away (and when I'm here too!)

emails.subject: RE: Performance Reviews
emails.body: RE: Performance Reviews Does Fri at 10 work for you? I may be in tomorrow too after I make sure Alina won't freak out with the babysitter. Next week sounds fine for vacation. I wasn't able to use the global phone in Kazakhstan. But a friend recently rented one and used in Europe. The neat thing is that you use you're reg cell number. Playdate sounds great Talk to you tomorrow. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: Performance Reviews
emails.body: I will plan on 10am tomorrow unless I hear from you. I am out this afternoon. See you tomorrow. To: Bryant, Mike
